message:
fix(hardening): saturating_add for u64 timestamp addition in epoch_transition_barrier and region_tree

Prevents potential overflow in timestamp arithmetic:
- epoch_transition_barrier.rs: propose_timestamp_ms + elapsed_ms
- region_tree.rs: timestamp_ms + drain_budget_ms (3 sites)

Closes bd-qoir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
